column7: 21st rejected: 'Too many connections. Please try again later.' Limit: 20 per 60s per IP.

column7: Joined room 'trip:{tripId}'. Booking update received instantly without page refresh.

column6: 1. Emit 'leave-trip' with tripId 2. Booking happens on that trip
column7: No update received after leaving room. No error. Clean unsubscribe.

column6: 1. Driver emits 'location-update' with {lat, lng, tripId} 2. Passenger is in same trip room
column7: Passenger receives driver location. Map marker updates in real-time.

column6: 1. Driver emits location-update with lat=999 or lng='abc'
column7: Silently dropped. No broadcast to trip room. No error to driver.

column6: 1. Driver sends 10 location updates within 100ms
column7: ~1 processed per 200ms. Rest dropped. Prevents flooding passengers.

column6: 1. User closes app or kills connection 2. Check server-side
column7: User removed from all rooms. No orphan listeners or memory leak.

column6: 1. Connect 2. Kill network briefly 3. Network restores
column7: Socket auto-reconnects. Re-authenticated. Rejoined user room.

column6: 1. User A has app open (socket connected) 2. Trigger notification for A (e.g. booking)
column7: Notification appears in-app instantly via socket. Bell badge updates. No page refresh needed.

column6: 1. Enter wrong password 10 times for same email 2. Try 11th attempt
column7: 429: 'Account temporarily locked. Try again in 30 minute(s).' Blocked for 30 min.

column6: 1. Account locked (10 wrong attempts) 2. Try correct password
column7: 429: Still blocked. Shows remaining minutes (e.g. 'Try again in 28 minute(s)').

column6: 1. Lock User A (10 wrong passwords) 2. Login as User B with correct password
column7: User B login works normally. Lockout is per-user only.

column6: 1. Account locked 2. Wait 30 min (or set locked_until to past in DB) 3. Login
column7: Login succeeds. Counter reset to 0. Account fully unlocked.

column6: 1. Wrong password 5 times 2. Correct password (login OK) 3. Wrong password 5 more times
column7: Step 2 works + resets counter to 0. Step 3: NOT locked (only 5 failures, not 10).

column6: 1. Account locked via wrong passwords 2. Login via phone OTP instead
column7: OTP login works. Resets failed_login_attempts=0 and locked_until=NULL.

column4: E9. DATA RETENTION & CLEANUP (Nightly Job Details)

column6: 1. Save FCM token 2. Don't update for 30+ days 3. Nightly cleanup runs
column7: Token deleted from fcm_tokens table. Next push attempt to this device fails silently.

column6: 1. Complete a union trip 2. After 15 days → nightly cleanup runs
column7: Trip + bookings deleted. Union trips kept 15 days (vs 7 for independent).

column6: 1. Trip with status='scheduled' or 'in_progress' 2. Cleanup runs
column7: Trip NOT deleted. Only completed/cancelled trips are eligible for cleanup.

column6: 1. Booking status='confirmed' 2. Pending expiry job runs
column7: Confirmed booking NOT touched. Only 'pending' bookings auto-expired.

column6: 1. User logs in 2. After 90 days → nightly cleanup
column7: Login history row deleted. Recent logins preserved.

column6: 1. Driver sends location updates 2. After 7 days → cleanup
column7: Location data deleted. Privacy protection. Recent locations kept.

column6: 1. Admin resolves complaint 2. After 90 days post-resolution → cleanup
column7: Complaint deleted. Open (unresolved) complaints kept forever.

column6: 1. 100 broadcasts exist in DB 2. Admin sends 101st 3. Cleanup runs
column7: Oldest broadcast deleted. Maximum 100 kept. FIFO order.

column6: 1. Day passes 2. At 00:05 IST (18:35 UTC) → dailyStatsJob runs
column7: New row in daily_stats: new_users, new_trips, completed_trips, cancelled_trips, active_drivers.

column6: 1. Daily stats older than 180 days 2. dailyStatsJob runs
column7: Old stats rows deleted. Recent 180 days kept for dashboard + CSV export.

column6: 1. Nightly cleanup completes 2. Check server logs
column7: Log: 'VACUUM ANALYZE complete' for high-churn tables. Dead tuples cleaned.

column6: 1. GET /api/v1/trips/search?from=Dehradun&to=Purola 2. GET /api/trips/search with same params
column7: Both return identical 200 response. /api/v1/ silently rewritten to /api/.

column5: All routes work with v1 prefix
column6: 1. Hit /api/v1/auth/profile with valid token 2. Hit /api/v1/notifications
column7: Both work normally. Backward compatibility for older app versions.

column7: Error: Ride departure must be at least 2 hours from now.

column7: Error: From and To location cannot be the same.

column7: Error: Already have scheduled ride at this time.

column7: Error: Fare must be at least ₹10.

column6: 1. Enter fare ₹15000 2. Create
column7: Error: Fare cannot exceed ₹10000.

column6: 1. Find ride where departure just passed (API call) 2. Try booking
column7: Error: Ride has already departed.

column6: 1. Book ride A → pending 2. Try booking ride A again
column7: Error: Already have active booking on this ride.

column6: 1. Get cancel-blocked (8+ cancels) 2. Try booking any ride
column7: Error: Cancel limit exceeded. Wait until block expires.

column6: 1. Find ride departing in <2 min 2. Book seat
column7: Booking auto-confirmed (skips approval). No pending state.

column6: 1. Find ride departing in 30 min (approval=true) 2. Book
column7: Booking goes to Pending. Normal flow.

column5: Cancel confirmed booking <1 hour before departure
column6: 1. Confirmed booking departure <1 hour 2. Cancel
column7: Error: Cancel at least 60 minutes before departure.

column5: Cancel within 5 min of booking creation
column6: 1. Book seat 2. Within 5 minutes tap cancel (even if departure <1 hour)
column7: Cancel succeeds. Grace period allows it.

column5: Cancel after 5 min of creation when <1 hour to departure
column6: 1. Book seat 2. Wait >5 minutes 3. Cancel (departure <1 hour)
column7: Error: Cannot cancel within 1 hour of departure.

column6: 1. Cancel 8 confirmed bookings over time
column7: After 8th: 24-hour block. Cannot cancel or book.

column6: 1. Get 24h blocked 2. Wait 24 hours 3. Try booking
column7: Booking works again after block expires.

column4: Driver Gets Rating on Passenger Cancel
column6: 1. Passenger cancels confirmed booking 2. Check driver notifications
column7: Driver gets: 'Rate your passenger — Passenger ne ride cancel ki'.

column5: Cancel <5 hours before departure with passengers
column6: 1. Trip with confirmed passengers + departure in <5 hours 2. Cancel
column7: Error: Cannot cancel within 5 hours with confirmed passengers.

column5: Cancel within 5 min of trip creation
column6: 1. Create trip 2. Someone books 3. Cancel within 5 min (even if departure <5h)
column7: Cancel succeeds. Grace period allows it.

column5: Cancel after 5 min of creation when <5 hours to departure
column6: 1. Create trip 2. Wait >5 min 3. Cancel (departure <5h with passengers)
column7: Error: Cannot cancel with confirmed passengers.

column6: 1. Trip with no confirmed passengers 2. Cancel anytime
column7: Cancel succeeds regardless of time to departure.

column6: 1. Cancel 5 trips over time
column7: After 5th: 48-hour block. Cannot cancel or create.

column7: Each confirmed passenger gets: 'Rate your driver — Driver ne ride cancel ki'.

column6: 1. Ride status = in_progress 2. Try cancel
column7: Error: Ride has already started.
